mapper.select: /* 메인화면용 QNA list*/ SELECT A1.* FROM ( SELECT QNA_CD AS qnaCd, PARENT_QNA_CD AS parentQnaCd, TITLE AS title FROM DOCS_QNA WHERE PARENT_QNA_CD IS NULL AND INSERT_USER_CD = #{sessionUser.userCd} ORDER BY QNA_CD DESC LIMIT 10 ) A1
/* 메인화면용 QNA 댓글 list*/ SELECT A1.* FROM ( SELECT QNA_CD AS qnaCd, PARENT_QNA_CD AS parentQnaCd, TITLE AS title FROM DOCS_QNA WHERE PARENT_QNA_CD = #{qnaCd} ORDER BY QNA_CD ASC LIMIT 10 ) A1

SELECT req.QNA_CD AS qnaCd, req.PARENT_QNA_CD AS parentQnaCd, req.TITLE AS title, req.CONTENTS AS contents, ( SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER tmp WHERE tmp.USER_CD = req.INSERT_USER_CD ) AS insertUserNm FROM DOCS_QNA req WHERE req.QNA_CD = #{qnaCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(QNA_CD AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 AS qnaCd FROM DOCS_QNA
INSERT INTO DOCS_QNA ( QNA_CD, TITLE, INSERT_USER_CD, CONTENTS, INSERT_DT, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( #{qnaCd}, #{qnaTitle}, #{sessionUser.userCd}, #{contents}, NOW(), 'N' )

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(QNA_CD AS INTEGER)), 0) + 1 AS qnaCd FROM DOCS_QNA
INSERT INTO DOCS_QNA ( QNA_CD, TITLE, INSERT_USER_CD, CONTENTS, INSERT_DT, PARENT_QNA_CD, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( #{qnaCd}, #{qnaTitle}, #{sessionUser.userCd}, #{contents}, NOW(), #{parentQnaCd}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT req.QNA_CD AS qnaCd, req.TITLE AS title, req.INSERT_USER_CD AS insertUserNm FROM DOCS_QNA req WHERE req.QNA_CD = #{qnaCd}

SELECT docsUser.*, company.COMPANY_NM, company.BIZ_NO, company.DIST_PURCHASER_USER_CD AS purchaserUid, dept.TEAM_LEADER_USER_CD AS teamLeaderUid, 'N' AS passUseYn FROM DOCS_USER docsUser LEFT JOIN DOCS_COMPANY company ON docsUser.COMPANY_CD = company.COMPANY_CD LEFT JOIN DOCS_DEPT dept ON docsUser.DEPT_CD = dept.DEPT_CD WHERE docsUser.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT rel.ROLE_CODE AS roleCd, menu.MENU_TYPE FROM ITS_REL_ROLE_GROUP rel JOIN DOCS_MENU menu ON rel.ROLE_CODE = menu.ROLE_CD WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{roleGroup}
